login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign-in flow lands in C9 (auth foundation). This page is a placeholder.
login.subtitleActive: Sign in with your tenant code, email and password.

admin.title: Admin Console
admin.subtitle: Insight Mode workspace for Super Admin, Operations, Account Manager, and Team Leader roles.

authBar.notSignedIn: You're not signed in. Sign in to access the admin API.

placeholder.heading: Admin shell
placeholder.body: C4 ships only the layout, side-nav, header, and i18n. Business screens (Companies, Countries, Teams, Users, Audit) are scheduled for chunks C12–C16.

dashboard.heading: Manage organization
dashboard.body: Quick links to the org-structure and CRM-core admin screens.
dashboard.usersDesc: Operators with role and team assignment

common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this {entity}?

companies.title: Companies
companies.subtitle: Partner companies the tenant operates for.
companies.name: Name
companies.deleteHint: Companies that still have countries cannot be deleted; deactivate them instead.
companies.emptyHint: Create the first company to start adding countries and teams.

countries.title: Countries
countries.subtitle: (Company × Country) operating units.
countries.name: Name
countries.deleteHint: Countries that still have teams cannot be deleted; deactivate them instead.
countries.emptyHint: Add a country under a company to start grouping teams.
countries.noCompanies: Create a company first before adding countries.

teams.title: Teams
teams.subtitle: Working groups inside a country.
teams.name: Name
teams.deleteHint: Deleting a team detaches its users (no user is removed).
teams.emptyHint: Add a team under a country to start assigning users.
teams.noCountries: Create a country first before adding teams.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Operators with role + team assignment.
users.name: Name
users.passwordHint: 8–128 chars. Used for the first sign-in.
users.disableConfirm: Disable this user? They will no longer be able to sign in.
users.rolePickerHint: Pick a role discovered from existing users.
users.emptyHint: Invite the first operator to start working in this tenant.
users.emptyFilteredHint: Try widening the team / role / status filters.

userScope.title: Manage data access — {name}
userScope.notNeeded: The role "{role}" already covers everything this user can see. No company or country selections are needed.

scopeExplanations.country: Sees records in the countries you select below.
scopeExplanations.company: Sees records in the companies you select below.
scopeExplanations.team: Sees records belonging to anyone in their team.
scopeExplanations.own: Sees only records assigned to them.

companies.label: Companies this user can see
companies.help: Pick one or more companies. The user will see leads, captains, and conversations linked to these companies.
companies.required: Pick at least one company — without it the user will see nothing.

countries.label: Countries this user can see
countries.help: Pick one or more countries. The user will see records linked to these countries.
countries.required: Pick at least one country — without it the user will see nothing.

preview.title: What this user will see
preview.empty: Nothing yet — pick at least one item above.
preview.blockedTitle: This user will see no data
preview.blockedBody: Their role requires at least one selection above. Pick one to continue.

leads.title: Leads
leads.subtitle: Prospective captains in the funnel.

lostReasonModal.title: Mark as lost
lostReasonModal.intro: Pick a rejection reason. This is recorded with the stage change so reports can break down lost leads by cause.
lostReasonModal.noteHint: A short context line shown on the lead detail page.

lens.kanbanComingNext: Kanban view is being prepared in the next release. The list view below shows the same leads.
lens.mobileFallback: Kanban works best on a wider screen. We've switched to the list view automatically.

kanban.moreInColumn: +{count} more — open list view to see all
kanban.emptyPipeline: This pipeline has no stages yet
kanban.emptyPipelineHint: Add stages to the pipeline (Pipeline Builder) before opening the board.
kanban.emptyFiltered: No leads match the current filters
kanban.emptyFilteredHint: Clear filters above to see every lead in this pipeline.

leads.emptyHint: Create the first lead to start working the funnel.
leads.emptyFilteredHint: Try clearing the stage filter or search box.
leads.name: Name
leads.myOverdueDisabled: Sign in to use this filter

bulk.confirmDelete: Delete {n} leads? This cannot be undone.

advanced.overdueOnly: Only leads with an overdue follow-up

leads.autoAssignNoEligible: No eligible agent available right now.
leads.convertHint: Converts the lead to a Captain row and moves it to the converted stage.

import.title: Bulk import leads from CSV
import.fileHint: First row must be a header. Phones are normalised to E.164.
import.needHeaders: Read the file headers before mapping.

quickActions.terminalHint: Lead is in a terminal stage

nextAction.title: Next action
nextAction.emptyHint: No follow-up scheduled. Schedule one so this lead doesn't fall through.

followUpModal.title: Schedule follow-up
followUpModal.intro: Pick a type, when, and a short note.
followUpModal.notePlaceholder: Confirm vehicle docs / Send WhatsApp template / …

errors.invalid: Pick a valid date and time.
errors.inPast: Pick a time in the future.

detail.noActivitiesHint: Notes, calls, and system events will appear here as the lead progresses.
detail.notePlaceholder: What did you discuss with the lead?
detail.callPlaceholder: Outcome of the call (e.g. interested, no answer, voicemail)…
detail.cantConvertLost: Re-open the lead to a non-terminal stage before converting.

pipeline.title: Pipeline
pipeline.subtitle: Drag a lead between columns to move its stage.
pipeline.moveBlocked: Cannot drop on the same stage

metaLeadSources.title: Meta lead sources
metaLeadSources.subtitle: Map Meta lead-ad pages and forms onto CRM lead fields. The public webhook reads this list at ingest time.
metaLeadSources.webhookHint: Point the Meta lead-gen webhook at /api/v1/webhooks/meta/leadgen — each Page must use the verify token configured below.
metaLeadSources.emptyHint: Add one for each Meta Page (and optionally a single form) so inbound leads land in the CRM.
metaLeadSources.confirmDelete: Delete "{name}"? Inbound leads from this Page will stop ingesting.

form.pageIdHint: Numeric ID from the Page's About → Page Transparency.
form.formIdHint: Restrict to one form on the page; leave empty to accept all forms.
form.verifyTokenHint: Random shared secret you also paste into Meta's webhook config.
form.verifyTokenEditHint: Leave blank to keep the current token.
form.appSecretHint: When set, the webhook signature is verified with HMAC-SHA256.
form.appSecretEditHint: Leave blank to keep the current secret.
form.fieldMappingHint: Maps Meta field names → CRM lead fields. Required targets: name, phone. Optional: email.

errors.mappingInvalid: Field mapping must be valid JSON: an object of string → string.
errors.mappingMissingTargets: Field mapping must define at least one entry pointing to "name" and one to "phone".
errors.verifyTokenRequired: Verify token is required when creating a new source.

distributionPage.title: Distribution Engine
distributionPage.subtitle: Routing rules, per-agent capacity, and the routing-decision audit trail.
distributionPage.noAccess: You don't have permission to view distribution settings.

rules.intro: Rules are evaluated in priority order (lowest number wins). The first rule whose conditions match the lead picks the strategy.
rules.emptyHint: Add a rule to route specific lead sources, companies, or countries to a chosen team or agent.

form.name: Name
form.conditions: Match conditions (all that are set must match)
form.conditionsHint: Leave a field blank to match any value.
form.strategyHint: How to pick an agent from the candidate pool.

errors.targetUserRequired: Target user is required when strategy is "specific user".
errors.targetUserOnlyForSpecific: Target user is only valid when strategy is "specific user".

capacities.intro: Per-agent capacity controls. Weight drives the weighted strategy; max active leads + availability + out-of-office gate every strategy.

form.maxActiveHint: Leave empty for no cap. 0 means the agent is at capacity immediately.
form.oofHint: Agent is excluded from routing until this time. Leave empty to clear.

errors.maxActiveRange: Max active leads must be between 0 and 10,000.
errors.oofInvalid: Out-of-office time is not a valid date.

logs.intro: Newest first. Filter by lead id and date to drill into a specific decision.
logs.empty: No routing decisions match the filters
logs.emptyHint: Try clearing filters or widening the date range.

lostReasons.title: Lost reasons
lostReasons.subtitle: The catalogue of rejection reasons agents can pick when marking a lead as lost.
lostReasons.intro: Codes are immutable once created. Labels and ordering can be changed any time. The 'other' reason is protected and always visible to agents.
lostReasons.noAccess: You don't have permission to view lost reasons.
lostReasons.emptyHint: The seed installs 7 reasons per tenant. If this list is empty something has been deleted manually — re-create at least one.

form.displayOrderHint: Lower numbers appear first in the agent picker.

errors.labelsRequired: Both English and Arabic labels are required.
errors.orderInvalid: Order must be a non-negative number.
errors.cannotDeactivateProtected: The 'other' reason is protected and cannot be deactivated.

whatsappTemplates.title: WhatsApp templates
whatsappTemplates.subtitle: Meta-approved templates the agent picker uses to start or re-open conversations.
whatsappTemplates.name: Name

backup.title: Backup & export
backup.subtitle: Download a JSON snapshot of this tenant's CRM data.
backup.cardBody: Includes leads, captains, follow-ups, conversations, bonuses and more — capped at 10,000 rows per table.

includes.whatsapp: WhatsApp accounts (no tokens), conversations, messages, templates

backup.stripped: Sensitive fields are stripped: WhatsApp access tokens, user password hashes, app secrets, verify tokens.
backup.forbidden: You don't have the tenant.export capability — ask an admin to grant it.
backup.opsHint: For a full database backup (all tenants, every column) use scripts/backup.sh — see scripts/README.md.

tenantSettings.title: Tenant settings
tenantSettings.subtitle: Timezone, SLA window, and default phone country code for the active tenant.
tenantSettings.defaultDialCodeHint: E.164 country prefix (e.g. "+20"). Prepended to local-format phone numbers ("01001234567" → "+201001234567").

distributionMoved.title: Lead distribution moved
distributionMoved.body: Routing rules, per-agent capacity, and the routing-decision log now live on the dedicated Distribution page.

distribution.title: Lead distribution rules
distribution.hint: Route incoming leads of a specific source straight to a chosen agent. Anything without a rule falls back to round-robin.
distribution.empty: No rules yet — every source is currently routed via round-robin.
distribution.fallback: If a rule's agent is disabled or no longer eligible, auto-assign falls back to round-robin automatically.
distribution.allCovered: Every source already has a rule.
distribution.noUsers: Need at least one active user to add a rule.

pipelineBuilder.title: Pipeline Builder
pipelineBuilder.subtitle: Manage funnel definitions per company × country.
pipelineBuilder.name: Name
pipelineBuilder.deleteConfirm: Delete this pipeline? Stages will be removed.
pipelineBuilder.stageTerminalKindHint: Decides whether this terminal stage marks the lead as Won or Lost. Leave as None for archive-style stages.
pipelineBuilder.stageStatusComingSoonTitle: Per-stage statuses (e.g. Awaiting reply / Replied) are planned for a later iteration.
pipelineBuilder.selectPipelineHint: Pick a pipeline from the list to edit its stages.

captains.title: Captains
captains.subtitle: Leads converted to active drivers.
captains.name: Name
captains.emptyHint: Convert a lead from the leads list to create the first captain.

trips.duplicate: Trip already recorded — counted as duplicate.

bonuses.title: Bonuses
bonuses.subtitle: Bonus rules for captain incentives. Payout engine is not yet wired.
bonuses.emptyBody: Create a rule to define how bonuses are triggered and how much is paid.

competitions.title: Competitions
competitions.subtitle: Time-bounded contests with a leaderboard. Reward payout is not yet wired.
competitions.emptyBody: Create one to track team performance over a window.
competitions.leaderboardEmpty: No data yet for this competition.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Recent admin actions across leads, follow-ups, bonuses, competitions, and WhatsApp handovers.
audit.emptyBody: Mutations to leads, follow-ups, bonuses, competitions, and WhatsApp handovers will appear here.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Tenant-level snapshot of leads, follow-ups, and conversion.

timeseries.title: Activity over time
timeseries.subtitle: Daily counts for the selected metric. Default window is the trailing 30 days.
timeseries.empty: No activity in the selected window.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Inbox
whatsapp.subtitle: Assigned conversations across every connected account.
whatsapp.linkLeadHint: Pick a lead to attach this conversation to.
whatsapp.selectAConversationHint: Pick one from the list to read its messages.
whatsapp.handoverNeedsLead: Link the conversation to a lead first.
whatsapp.handoverHint: Reassigns the linked lead and writes an audit-trail entry.

full.title: Full transfer
full.body: Keep all message history; just reassign the lead.

clean.title: Clean transfer
clean.body: Close the current conversation; future inbound starts a fresh thread.

summary.title: Summary transfer
summary.body: Add a handover summary as a note on the lead.

whatsapp.handoverSummaryPlaceholder: Outline what the new agent should know…
whatsapp.handoverNotify: Notify the new agent (records intent in the audit log).

list.emptyMineBody: New inbound messages routed to you will appear here automatically.
list.emptyAllBody: Once your tenant starts receiving WhatsApp messages, they'll show up here.

thread.selectBody: Pick a conversation from the list to read and reply.
thread.empty: No messages yet — start the conversation with an approved template.

compose.placeholderWindowClosed: The 24-hour window is closed — send a template to re-open
compose.windowClosedBanner: The 24-hour customer-service window is closed. Send an approved template to re-open the conversation.
compose.windowClosingSoonBanner: The 24-hour window is closing soon — wrap up your reply or send a template.
compose.closedBanner: This conversation is closed. Reopen it before sending.
compose.noPermission: You don't have permission to send WhatsApp messages.
compose.noTextPermission: Text replies aren't permitted on your role.
compose.templateComingSoon: Template picker — coming in the next chunk.
compose.mediaComingSoon: Media picker — coming in the next chunk.

sidePanel.title: Conversation details
sidePanel.comingSoon: Inline contact editing and quick lead actions land in the next chunk.

contact.title: Contact
contact.languageHint: What language does the customer prefer to write in?
contact.readOnlyHint: Read-only — your role doesn't allow editing this contact.

lead.title: Linked lead
lead.linkLockedHint: Linking a lead requires WhatsApp link permission.
lead.outOfScope: The linked lead isn't available in your scope.
lead.ownerMismatch: Conversation owner differs from linked lead owner.

addNote.title: Add note to linked lead
addNote.helper: The note is saved to the lead timeline and tagged as coming from WhatsApp.
addNote.bodyHint: Up to 4,000 characters. Visible to anyone with access to this lead.
addNote.bodyPlaceholder: Outline what the customer said or what needs to happen next…
addNote.mustEnterBody: Write a short note before saving.

assign.title: Reassign conversation
assign.helper: This assigns the conversation to the selected user. Messages and the linked lead are not changed.
assign.searchPlaceholder: Search users by name or email…

handover.summaryRequired: Add a handover summary or pick a different transfer mode.
handover.summaryHint: Up to 2,000 characters. Saved as a note on the linked lead.

close.title: Close conversation
close.body: Closing stops normal follow-up on this thread. Messages and the linked lead are not deleted, and the conversation can be reopened later if your role allows it.

reopen.title: Reopen conversation
reopen.body: Reopening makes the conversation active again. The linked lead's stage is not changed.

unlinkLead.title: Unlink lead
unlinkLead.body: This removes the link between this conversation and the lead. Neither record is deleted, and ownership of the conversation stays the same.

linkLead.title: Link conversation to a lead
linkLead.helper: Paste the Lead ID. Only leads inside your scope can be linked.
linkLead.idHint: Copy the ID from the lead detail URL.
linkLead.invalidId: That doesn't look like a valid Lead ID.
linkLead.notFound: Lead not found in your scope.

roles.title: Roles & permissions
roles.subtitle: Manage system and custom roles, capability matrix, data scope, and field-level permissions.
roles.deleteConfirm: Delete role "{name}"? Users with this role must be reassigned first.
roles.duplicateIntro: Capabilities, data scope, and field permissions are copied from the source role into a new editable role.
roles.systemRoleNotice: System roles are immutable. Use Duplicate to create a custom role based on this one.
roles.capabilitiesIntro: Toggle the capabilities granted to this role. Capabilities are grouped by module.
roles.scopesIntro: Choose how broadly each role can read records — own only, team, company, country, or all tenants.
roles.fieldsIntro: Toggle which fields users with this role can read or write. Sensitive fields are highlighted.
roles.emptyBody: Create a custom role or duplicate a system role to start building a permission profile.

form.codeHint: snake_case identifier — letters, digits, underscores. Used by API and integrations.
form.levelHint: 0–100. Higher values rank higher in role hierarchy displays.

agent.title: My Day
agent.subtitle: Execution Mode workspace for Sales, Activation, and Driving agents.

placeholder.heading: Agent shell
placeholder.body: C4 ships only the surface. The WhatsApp Inbox, Lead detail, and Performance views land in Phase 1.5 (W1–W12).

calendar.title: Follow-up calendar
calendar.subtitle: Every scheduled call, WhatsApp and visit, laid out by day.
calendar.pickADayHint: Select a day on the grid to see its follow-ups.
calendar.emptyDayHint: No follow-ups land on this day.

workspace.title: My Leads
workspace.subtitle: Leads currently assigned to you. Update stage, log a note, schedule the next action.
workspace.noUser: Sign in to see your assigned leads.
workspace.emptyTitle: No leads assigned to you yet
workspace.emptyBody: When a manager assigns leads to you, they'll appear here.

followUps.title: My Follow-ups
followUps.emptyHint: No pending follow-ups. Schedule one when you update a lead.

followUpToast.overdueBody: Open the calendar to catch up.

snoozeModal.title: Snooze follow-up
snoozeModal.intro: Push this follow-up out of your overdue / due-today lists. It returns automatically when the snooze ends.

errors.invalid: Pick a valid date and time.
errors.inPast: Pick a time in the future.

inbox.title: WhatsApp inbox
inbox.subtitle: Live conversations with leads and captains.
inbox.emptyHint: Inbound WhatsApp messages will appear here.
inbox.emptyFilteredHint: Try clearing the account, phone, or status filters.
inbox.noMessagesHint: Once the lead replies on WhatsApp the thread will appear here.
inbox.selectAConversationHint: Pick one from the list to read and reply.
inbox.composerPlaceholderClosed: Window closed — pick a template to reach out.
inbox.composerClosed: Conversation is closed — replies are disabled.
inbox.windowNever: No reply yet — use a template
inbox.windowSendDisabled: Customer hasn't replied within 24h. Use a template.
inbox.mediaWindowDisabled: Media uses the freeform window. Use a template first.
inbox.noTemplates: No approved templates for this account.

handover.disabledClosed: Conversation is closed — handover is disabled.
handover.title: Transfer this conversation
handover.hint: Reassigns the linked lead and writes an audit-trail entry.

full.title: Full transfer
full.body: Keeps the chat open; lead reassigns to the new agent.

clean.title: Clean handoff
clean.body: Closes the current conversation; the new agent starts fresh.

summary.title: Summary
summary.body: Posts a handover note onto the lead so the new agent has context.

handover.summaryPlaceholder: Outline what the new agent should know…
handover.notify: Notify the new agent (records intent in the audit log).
